verification_notes: S5.A1 Hint click reveals basic-strategy action label sourced from strategyTable.recommendation(getCurrentHintQuery()). S5.A2 review panel renders one row per decision after each resolved hand. S5.A3 hint area writes only the action label as textContent — no reasoning, no chart, no , no .
rationale: Critical S5.A1 and S5.A2 user_flow assertions verified by code review.
